name: clikit

metadata.name: clikit
metadata.summary: CliKit is a group of utilities to build beautiful and testable command line interfaces.

documentation:
# CliKit

CliKit is a group of utilities to build beautiful and testable command line interfaces.

This is at the core of [Cleo](https://github.com/sdispater/cleo).

Removes the progress bar from the current line.

This is useful if you wish to write some output
while a progress bar is running.
Call display() to show the progress bar again.
